role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund uses Intelligent Alpha, LLC’s proprietary artificial intelligence-powered stock selection strategy to create an intelligent equal weight portfolio of global large cap stocks with over $1 billion in market capitalization. The securities selected will be based on the major trading trends inspired by the greatest traders in the world. The fund is non-diversified.
